summary: A brief MIT faculty profile for Robert S. Langer. It lists his extensive awards, research interests, and includes a short statement on the broad utility and world-changing potential of a chemical engineering background.

principles.statement: Chemical engineering provides one of the broadest possible foundations for making an impact.
principles.rationale: The discipline allows you to work across diverse fields like nanotechnology, materials, energy, and medicine, ultimately enabling you to invent things that change the world.
principles.source_quote: Chemical engineering is one of the broadest backgrounds one can have. It can enable you to work in so many areas - nanotechnology, materials, energy, medicine, and many others. And it can enable you to discover and invent things that can change the world.

signature_quotes.text: Chemical engineering is one of the broadest backgrounds one can have. It can enable you to work in so many areas - nanotechnology, materials, energy, medicine, and many others. And it can enable you to discover and invent things that can change the world.
signature_quotes.context: Describing the value of the field on his MIT faculty profile.
